steps.title: Use the habitual time frame
steps.content: The passage describes what happens each night in the marina. Present-tense wording such as is bathed and is shows an ongoing, habitual action.

steps.title: Keep present tense
steps.content: The verb should match the present habitual description of the lamp's action. A points to the future, C suggests a conditional or past habitual action, and D shifts to simple past. The present-tense verb fits the sentence. The answer is B.
